problem id: 3f93c370
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10000100 -> 11111110
  10010001 -> 00010011
  00111100 -> 00010000
  11000011 -> 00010111
  01111000 -> 00100001
  10011100 -> 00111010
  10010101 -> 00110010
  01010110 -> 11011011
  11010101 -> 00100011
  01011101 -> 01000001

query: 10111110
predicted answer: 10100010
